info.title: StellarRoute API
info.description:
REST API for DEX aggregation on the Stellar Network.

StellarRoute aggregates liquidity from Stellar's SDEX (Stellar Distributed
Exchange) and Soroban AMM pools to find the best available price for any
token pair.

## Asset identifiers

Assets are encoded in path segments using one of three formats:

| Format | Example | Meaning |
|--------|---------|---------|
| `native` | `native` | XLM (Stellar's native asset) |
| `CODE` | `USDC` | Issued asset — code only (omits issuer) |
| `CODE:ISSUER` | `USDC:GA5ZSEJ...` | Issued asset — fully qualified |

## Error handling

All errors return a JSON body with `error` (machine-readable code) and
`message` (human-readable description).  See the `ErrorResponse` schema
and the **Error codes** section below for the full list.

## Rate limiting

Endpoints are rate-limited per IP address.  When the limit is exceeded the
API returns **429 Too Many Requests** with `X-RateLimit-*` headers.

tags.name: trading
tags.description: Market data — trading pairs, orderbooks, and price quotes

get.description:
Probes PostgreSQL and Redis (when configured) and returns a per-component
status map.

Returns **200 OK** when all required dependencies are healthy.
Returns **503 Service Unavailable** when any required dependency is down.

Returns all trading pairs that currently have active offers in the
SDEX orderbook, ordered by liquidity depth (most offers first).

Results are cached for **30 seconds**.  Up to **100** pairs are
returned per request.

Returns bids and asks for the given base/quote asset pair.

**Bids** are orders to buy the base asset with the quote asset
(sorted highest price first).  **Asks** are orders to sell the base
asset for the quote asset (sorted lowest price first).

Results are cached for **10 seconds**.

example.message: Invalid base asset: unknown asset format

404.description: Asset pair not found in the orderbook

get.description:
Returns the best available price and routing path for trading `amount`
of the base asset for the quote asset (or vice-versa when
`quote_type=buy`).

The router evaluates both SDEX offers and Soroban AMM pools to find
the optimal execution path.

Results are cached for **5 seconds**.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of the base asset to trade (default `1`)

parameters.name: slippage_bps
parameters.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points (e.g. `50` = 0.50%). Max `10000` (100%).

parameters.name: quote_type
parameters.description:
Direction of the quote:
- `sell` — how much quote asset you receive when **selling** `amount` of the base asset
- `buy`  — how much base asset you must spend to **buy** `amount` of the quote asset

400.description: Invalid parameters (bad asset format or non-positive amount)

example.message: Amount must be greater than zero

404.description: No trading route found for this pair

example.message: No route found for this trading pair

422.description: Stale market data — all data sources are too old to provide a quote

example.message: All market data inputs are stale

get.description:
Returns only the optimal execution path and routing steps for trading
`amount` of the base asset for the quote asset.

Unlike the quote endpoint, this returns a simplified response without
detailed pricing breakdown or venue evaluations.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of the base asset to trade (default `1`)

parameters.name: slippage_bps
parameters.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points (e.g. `50` = 0.50%). Max `10000` (100%).

parameters.name: quote_type
parameters.description:
Direction of the quote:
- `sell` — how much quote asset you receive when **selling** `amount` of the base asset
- `buy`  — how much base asset you must spend to **buy** `amount` of the quote asset

400.description: Invalid parameters (bad asset format or invalid slippage)

404.description: No trading route found for this pair

BaseAsset.name: base
BaseAsset.description:
Base asset identifier. One of:
- `native` — XLM
- `CODE` — issued asset code only (e.g. `USDC`)
- `CODE:ISSUER` — fully-qualified issued asset (e.g. `USDC:GA5Z...`)

QuoteAsset.name: quote
QuoteAsset.description:
Quote asset identifier. One of:
- `native` — XLM
- `CODE` — issued asset code only (e.g. `USDC`)
- `CODE:ISSUER` — fully-qualified issued asset (e.g. `USDC:GA5Z...`)

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the current window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Number of requests remaining in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp when the rate limit window resets

example.message: Too many requests — please slow down

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the health check

asset_issuer.description: G-address of the issuing account (null for native XLM)

TradingPair.description: A tradeable asset pair with active orderbook depth

offer_count.description: Number of active offers for this pair

last_updated.description: RFC-3339 timestamp of the most recent offer update

OrderbookLevel.description: A single price level in the orderbook

price.description: Price as a decimal string (7 decimal places)

amount.description: Available amount at this price level

total.description: Total value at this price level (`price × amount`)

OrderbookResponse.description: Full orderbook snapshot for a trading pair

bids.description: Buy orders sorted highest price first

asks.description: Sell orders sorted lowest price first

PathStep.description: A single hop in the optimal execution path

source.description:
Liquidity source for this hop:
- `sdex` — Stellar Distributed Exchange
- `amm:<pool_address>` — Soroban AMM pool

QuoteResponse.description: Best available price quote with full routing path

price.description: Effective price (quote asset per base asset unit)

path.description: Ordered list of hops in the optimal execution path

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the quote was generated

RouteResponse.description: Optimal trading route without pricing details

amount.description: Amount of base asset being traded

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the route calculation

message.example: Amount must be greater than zero

details.description: Optional structured context about the error
